Opcode.name: PCM_OP_CUST_DELETE_PROFILE
Opcode.Doc: Used to delete the /profile objects. It checks if the /profile object being deleted is used in any /group/sharing/profiles object. If so, then it will not allow the deletion of this /profile object.

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_POID
Poid.Doc: The poid of the profile object to be deleted.

Timestamp.name: PIN_FLD_START_T
Timestamp.Doc: Start time - Effective start timestamp of Deletion of this profile on an external system (System Time).

Timestamp.name: PIN_FLD_END_T
Timestamp.Doc: End time - Effective end timestamp of Deletion of this profile on an external system (System Time).

Substruct.name: PIN_FLD_CONTEXT_INFO
Substruct.Doc: Substruct to pass information from external clients.

String.name: PIN_FLD_CORRELATION_ID
String.Doc: Correlation id passed by an external system to BRM.

String.name: PIN_FLD_EXTERNAL_USER
String.Doc: User of an external system connecting to BRM.

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_POID
Poid.Doc: The poid of the /profile object deleted.

Substruct.name: PIN_FLD_CONTEXT_INFO
Substruct.Doc: Substruct to pass information from external clients.

String.name: PIN_FLD_CORRELATION_ID
String.Doc: Correlation id passed by an external system to BRM.

String.name: PIN_FLD_EXTERNAL_USER
String.Doc: User of an external system connecting to BRM.
